channel.title: AI21 Labs
channel.description: AI21 Labs — synthesized feed by ai-news-spider

item.title: First scale, then enrich: How the right execution strategy helped us reach state-of-the-art on SWE-rebench
item.description: In brief We present a new state-of-the-art result on the SWE-rebench benchmark: a 60.9% issue resolve rate for 123 issues between December and March, which surpasses the previous best published result on this same slice. This achievement came from rethinking the agent’s context extraction phase – a counterintuitive design choice we pursued and refined. Instead […]
